step_rationale: Purine oxidation marker; reflects ischemic oxidative stress and myocardial injury independent of atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: Xanthine, an oxidation product of hypoxanthine, marks myocardial ischemic injury and oxidative stress in acute coronary syndrome.

references.title: Purine metabolite-based machine learning models for risk prediction, prognosis, and diagnosis of coronary artery disease.
